user.title: Add a Zigbee2MQTT instance
user.description: Connects to a Zigbee2MQTT instance over your existing MQTT broker. This does not duplicate the entities Zigbee2MQTT already creates via its own MQTT discovery - it adds bridge-level controls and a curated set of extras.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Zigbee2MQTT instance, used to prefix its entities. Defaults to the base topic if left blank.
data_description.base_topic: The mqtt.base_topic configured in this instance's Zigbee2MQTT configuration.yaml (default: zigbee2mqtt).

abort.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not set up, or its broker connection is not yet available. Set up Home Assistant's MQTT integration first, then try again.
abort.already_configured: A Zigbee2MQTT instance with this base topic is already configured.

data_description.offline_threshold_minutes: Used only as a fallback for devices that don't publish their own availability topic - compared against their last_seen time.
data_description.networkmap_interval_minutes: 0 disables automatic refresh; the network map can still be refreshed on demand via its button or the refresh_networkmap service.
data_description.networkmap_type: Only "raw" produces structured attributes - graphviz/plantuml return a text graph instead.
data_description.networkmap_routes: Adds active route information to the network map, at the cost of a slower refresh.
data_description.permit_join_duration: Used when the permit-join switch is turned on; 254 matches Zigbee2MQTT's own default.

rename_device.name: Rename device
rename_device.description: Renames a Zigbee device via Zigbee2MQTT's bridge API.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The linked Zigbee device to rename.

to_name.name: New name
to_name.description: The new friendly name for the device.

remove_device.name: Remove device
remove_device.description: Removes a Zigbee device from the network.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The linked Zigbee device to remove.

force.name: Force
force.description: Force removal even if the device doesn't acknowledge it. Use as a last resort for devices that are no longer responding.

block.name: Block
block.description: Prevent the device from immediately rejoining the network.

reinterview_device.name: Re-interview device
reinterview_device.description: Forces Zigbee2MQTT to re-interview a device, re-reading its capabilities.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The linked Zigbee device to re-interview.

permit_join.name: Permit join
permit_join.description: Allows or disallows new Zigbee devices to join the network.

config_entry_id.name: Zigbee2MQTT instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Zigbee2MQTT instance to act on.

time.name: Duration
time.description: How long to permit joining, in seconds. 0 disallows joining immediately.

device_id.name: Device (optional)
device_id.description: Scope permit-join to a single router instead of the whole network. Leave blank to target the whole network.

config_entry_id.name: Zigbee2MQTT instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Zigbee2MQTT instance to restart.

set_options.name: Set bridge options
set_options.description: Updates Zigbee2MQTT's runtime configuration (advanced - mirrors Zigbee2MQTT's own options schema).

config_entry_id.name: Zigbee2MQTT instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Zigbee2MQTT instance to act on.

options.name: Options
options.description: A nested object matching Zigbee2MQTT's options schema - see the example for setting the advanced log level.

ota_check.name: Check for firmware update
ota_check.description: Checks whether a firmware update is available for a device, without installing it.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The linked Zigbee device to check.

ota_update.name: Install firmware update
ota_update.description: Installs an available firmware update on a device.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The linked Zigbee device to update.

refresh_networkmap.name: Refresh network map
refresh_networkmap.description: Requests a fresh network map from a Zigbee2MQTT instance.

config_entry_id.name: Zigbee2MQTT instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Zigbee2MQTT instance to act on.

type.name: Type (optional)
type.description: Overrides the configured network map type for this refresh only. Only "raw" produces structured attributes.

routes.name: Include routes (optional)
routes.description: Overrides the configured routes setting for this refresh only.

raw_command.name: Raw bridge command
raw_command.description: Publishes any bridge/request command and returns its response - an escape hatch for commands without dedicated UI, such as touchlink or group management.

config_entry_id.name: Zigbee2MQTT instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Zigbee2MQTT instance to act on.

command.name: Command
command.description: The bridge command name, e.g. touchlink/scan or group/add.

payload.name: Payload (optional)
payload.description: The JSON payload to send with the request.
